text:
ced sense in terms
of days and overs or sets or depending on nature of
the match. The dasa for 5 days match should include
the night also. Some of friends want to take till the
end of the match only.
• Use the 7th house as 1st house for the second team
playing. Use the principle of bhavath bhavnam. 8th
house as second house, 9th house as 3rd house, 10th
house as 4th house. The reduced vimhshottari dasa can
also be used. If for one day match with 50 overs,
divide the overs by 12 signs. So it will come
approximately 4 overs for every sign.
•
I use lagna chandra lagna and karkamsha lagna.
•
I never used the jamini or tajika styles for
prediction of results. I think it can be used with
some innovations and decent honest research.
Many people ask me whether it is ethical to predict. I have
simple rule. I predict and also tell people making money in
this way is wrong. Many times I have made prediction,
which has come right, but the person was not able to make
the money.
